stemHtml: Are heated temperature probes installed on aircraft and, if so, how are they corrected for temperature?

options.a: Rarely, because of air compressibility heating the probe.
options.b: Installed and corrected for temperature, typically around 10°C.
options.c: Installed and corrected for temperature, typically around 1°C.
options.d: Not installed, as air temperature is derived indirectly.
